name: Entangled Spirits

abilities.name: Healing Void
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model resolves an action where it ended a move within 1" of a Rift marker, it may choose to remove that marker to heal 3.

actions.name: Beyond's Invasion
actions.effects: Make one Rift marker within range, plus one more for each raise this action receives.

triggers.name: Realms Where Death Means Nothing
triggers.text: If a friendly master was killed this game, summon it with 7 health into base contact with a made marker.

extraction_notes: Card shows decorative border and character art of a female character with blue/purple face markings and a serpentine headdress
Healing Void is specified as 'Once per activation' which is a timing restriction on the ability
